title: S-Complete Medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"falfe","text":"Large quantities of C. elegans can be grown in a liquid medium. steps: 977 mL of S-Basal medium (Link below) S-Basal Medium by Adrien Assie
1 mL of 5 mg/ mL cholesterol (dissolved in Et-OH)
10 mL of 1 Molarity (M) Potassium Citrate Buffer, pH 6.0
10 mL of Trace metals solution (sterile) Trace Metals Solution by Adrien Assie
creator: Adrien Assie
